stem: In an information-theoretic argument, each weighing provides at most log₂(3) ≈ 1.585 bits. For the 12-coin problem (24 possible outcomes: 12 coins × {heavy, light}), minimum weighings needed is:

hint.level_2: 4.58 / 1.585 ≈ 2.89, so at least 3 weighings. And 3 suffice.
